data.body: Applied T9 + T8 (Joe agreed). T9 CLAIM ATOMICITY: signature-verify + open->in_progress transition are ONE atomic step (reuse rebar's atomic claim: re-read under lock + optimistic concurrency), not check-then-act -> no race where two agents both pass the check and both claim. Added to 5fd2 design clarifications + claim child 092b. T8 DET EXECUTION PATH: the deterministic floor P1-P8 is a first-class exec=DET tier the orchestrator dispatches via a CODE executor alongside 1-TURN/2-STEP/AGENT (so DET checks are actually RUN, not just named) -> added to 5fd2 + orchestrator child ca03 + DET-floor child 012e. All pass check-ac+clarity.
